source: National Park Service — Wrangell-St. Elias National Park & Preserve
title: Hubbard Glacier calving face
description: Wide view of the Hubbard Glacier terminus in Disenchantment Bay, showing the approximately 6-mile-wide calving face backed by the high St. Elias Mountains.
alt: The wide calving face of Hubbard Glacier in Disenchantment Bay with St. Elias Mountains behind
